title: epipactis leptochila var. collina
intro: Epipactis leptochila var. collina, also known as the Mountain Helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Epipactis leptochila var. collina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
